MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery GRANTED. No opposition filed Sanctions of $600 plus $40 cost awarded. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: A. James Robertson, not reported.
